title: ResearchTaskDispatchedPayload
description: Payload for eventforge.research.task.dispatched — a focused research sub-task spawned from knowledge mining.

task_id.description: Stable identifier for this research sub-task within the job.

task_index.description: Zero-based index of the sub-task within the job research fan-out.

sub_query.description: Focused research question for this sub-task.

entity_ids.description: Knowledge entity IDs providing context for this sub-task.
